tasks.subject: Task 1: Produce stage-3 paste-ready migration prompt
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write a self-contained Claude Code prompt that performs the requests/tenacity/tqdm → httpx/stamina/rich.progress source-code migration in three commits per the spec.

**Files:**
- Create: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-22-requests-tenacity-tqdm-migration-plan.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Plan file at the path above, containing a "Paste-ready prompt" section with a self-contained prompt block.
- [x] Pre-flight check matches spec: `pixi list | rg -q 'httpx|stamina' && ! pixi list | rg -q '^(requests|tenacity|tqdm)\s'`.
- [x] Three Conventional-Commits commit messages match spec wording.
- [x] Verification command matches scaffolded-project convention (`pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` + `pixi run test` per phase; `pixi run test --cov` at end).
- [x] All FLAG-TO-USER patterns from spec Section 4 are present in the prompt with explicit stop-and-ask instructions.
- [x] All OUT-OF-SCOPE items from spec are in the prompt's DO-NOT-DO list.

**Verify:** Open the plan file and confirm the seven acceptance criteria above. The plan's deliverable is the prompt artifact itself; there is no automated test for this plan because it's not executable code in this repo.

**Steps:** Single step — write the file. Done by the existence of the plan at the path above.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-22-requests-tenacity-tqdm-migration-plan.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-22-requests-tenacity-tqdm-migration-plan.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plan file exists", "paste-ready prompt section present", "pre-flight check matches spec", "three commit messages match spec", "verification command matches scaffolded-project convention", "all FLAG-TO-USER patterns present", "all OUT-OF-SCOPE items in DO-NOT-DO list"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
